findings.description: The knowledge file describes the TagAttributeVerifier directory path as "デフォルト: C:\\nablarch\\workspace\\tutorial\\main\\web\\WEB-INF\\tags\\widget" (i.e., a default value), but the source does not characterize it as a default. The source in 環境依存設定値の修正 explicitly instructs users to change this value to the actual directory where tag files are placed. Labeling it "デフォルト" implies it may be kept as-is, which contradicts the source's intent.
findings.source_evidence: Source (環境依存設定値の修正): "verification_config.json の下記の設定値を、実際にタグファイルが配置されているディレクトリに修正する。" — the path is an example to be replaced, not a default.

findings.description: The hints for s6 (環境依存設定値の修正) are missing "encoding", which is a configuration property explicitly shown in the TagAttributeVerifier JSON code block in the source.
findings.source_evidence: Source s6 code block: "\"encoding\": \"utf-8\"" — encoding is a distinct property alongside directory that a user may search for.
